zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Wynnington於1367年出生在英國爾諾維其時，她的父親Richard De Wynnington22歲，母親Emma de Mainwaring16歲。她於1390年與Nicholas de Warrene結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1417年在英國英格蘭爾普雷斯特波利享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Wynnington于1367年出生在英国爾諾維其时，她的父亲Richard De Wynnington22岁，母亲Emma de Mainwaring16岁。她于1390年与Nicholas de Warrene结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1417年在英国英格兰爾普雷斯特波利享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wynnington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: (i) locative name from Winnington (Cheshire, Staffs). (ii)  see  Wennington  .

variants.name: Wennington
meanings: English: (i) locative name from Wennington (Hunts, Essex). (ii)  see  Winnington  .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Wynnington was born in 1367, in Northwich, Cheshire, England, her father, Richard De Wynnington, was 22 and her mother, Emma de Mainwaring, was 16. She married Nicholas de Warrene in 1390. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died in 1417, in Prestbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Wynnington est née en 1367, à Northwich, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard De Wynnington, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Emma de Mainwaring, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas de Warrene en 1390. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1417, à Prestbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Wynnington 1367 in Northwich, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard De Wynnington 22 und ihre Mutter Emma de Mainwaring 16. Sie hat 1390 Nicholas de Warrene geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1417 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Prestbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Wynnington è nata il nel 1367 nel Northwich, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Richard De Wynnington, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Emma de Mainwaring, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Nicholas de Warrene nel 1390. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1417, nel Prestbury, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Wynningtonが1367年にイギリスチェシュアイアノースウィチで生まれた時，父Richard De Wynningtonは22歳，母Emma de Mainwaringは16歳であった。1390年にNicholas de Warreneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1417年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアプレストブリーで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Wynnington(이)가 1367년 영국 체실르 노르스위치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard De Wynnington(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emma de Mainwaring(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1390년 Nicholas de Warrene(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1417년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 프레스트버이에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Wynnington nasceu em 1367, em Northwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard De Wynnington, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Emma de Mainwaring, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicholas de Warrene em 1390. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1417, em Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Wynnington родилась в 1367 г. в местности нортвич, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard De Wynnington было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Emma de Mainwaring, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas de Warrene в 1390 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1417 г. в местности престбури, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Wynnington nació en 1367, en Northwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard De Wynnington, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Emma de Mainwaring, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Nicholas de Warrene en 1390. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió en 1417, en Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años.
